prd.oneLiner: Connect donor profiles, contribution and communication history, campaign segmentation, and retention analysis.
prd.goal: Improve 12-month new-donor retention and minimize missed acknowledgement messages.
prd.whyNow: Donor details, contribution history, campaign response, and acknowledgement activity are separated, making relationship management and campaign analysis difficult.
prd.problem: Donor details, contribution history, campaign response, and acknowledgement activity are separated, making relationship management and campaign analysis difficult.
prd.solution: Connect donor profiles, contribution and communication history, campaign segmentation, and retention analysis.
prd.alternatives: Email, chat, spreadsheets, and manual ledgers
prd.differentiator: Manage intake, processing, and operations data as one connected source of truth.

targets.name: Fundraiser managing donors and campaigns
targets.needs: Quickly register needed work and know its status.
targets.pain: Donor details, contribution history, campaign response, and acknowledgement activity are separated, making relationship management and campaign analysis difficult.

targets.name: Nonprofit operations and fundraising analytics coordinator
targets.needs: Manage priority and history and review operations metrics.
targets.pain: Donor details, contribution history, campaign response, and acknowledgement activity are separated, making relationship management and campaign analysis difficult.

scenarios.text: Fundraiser managing donors and campaigns completes donor profile and campaign-response capture and checks progress.
Nonprofit operations and fundraising analytics coordinator reviews donation conversion and donor-retention reporting by campaign and channel.

prd.northStar: Share of operations requests completed on time

kpis.name: On-time processing rate
kpis.target: Improve 12-month new-donor retention and minimize missed acknowledgement messages.
kpis.method: Monthly aggregation of completion history against target dates

kpis.name: Operations visibility
kpis.method: Share of registered requests connected to operations reporting

inScope: Donor, contribution, communication, and acknowledgement-status lookup
Donor segmentation, campaign delivery, post-gift acknowledgement, and renewal management
Donation conversion and donor-retention reporting by campaign and channel
nonGoals: Replacing adjacent systems such as accounting or payroll
assumptions: User and organization data are available through company SSO.
Operators manage policy and classification criteria.
risks: Weak initial classification can cause incorrect processing.
Stale source data can reduce operational trust.
openQuestions: What defines urgent processing and approval?
What are the post-completion verification and reopen rules?
constraints: State, owner, and priority changes require audit logs.
